milestones.title: Temperature
milestones.spec: cToF(c), fToC(f), cToK(c), kToC(k). Throw on non-finite input. Use test-utils approximateEqual for floats. Known points: 0C=32F, 100C=212F, 0C=273.15K.

milestones.title: Length
milestones.spec: mToFt(m), ftToM(ft), kmToMi(km), miToKm(mi). Throw on non-finite. approximateEqual for floats. 1 m ≈ 3.28084 ft.

milestones.title: Batch convert
milestones.spec: convertAll(values, fn) maps fn over array. convertTable(rows, fromFn, toFn) -> { input, output }[]. Re-export temperature + length helpers from one entry if desired.
